data.title: Hut 8 Corp. (Nasdaq: HUT) plans to release Q3 2025 earnings; a company specializing in energy infrastructure.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Hut 8 Corp. (traded on Nasdaq and TSX under the symbol HUT) based in Miami, revealed plans to unveil its financial information. The company specializes in energy infrastructure, combining power, digital infrastructure, and compute capabilities on a large scale to support energy-intensive applications of the future.

data.title: Advanced Powder Dynamics, under Tesseract Life Sciences, manufactures CapraMax™, advanced cyclodextrin inclusion sodium caprate.
data.description: In Payson, Arizona, as of October 16, 2025, Advanced Powder Dynamics (APD) has commenced production of cutting-edge sodium caprate, the latest groundbreaking compound developed by its parent company, Tesseract Life Sciences™. The sodium caprate, which is patent pending, is now being manufactured by APD. This commercialization is set to introduce state-of-the-art in sodium caprate technology to the market.

data.title: CVS Health aims to improve access to affordable fertility treatments for Americans through its Specialty Pharmacy at 9,000 locations.
data.description: CVS Health, based in Woonsocket, R.I., revealed on October 16, 2025, its commitment to enhancing access to cost-effective fertility treatments for Americans. The company, listed on NYSE as CVS, plans to facilitate easier access to fertility medications through its CVS Specialty Pharmacy. Additionally, CVS will streamline the process for individuals to pick up these medications at its extensive network of 9,000 community locations. This initiative aims to make fertility treatments more accessible and affordable for a broad range of individuals across the country.

data.title: Acqualina Resort introduces new oceanfront villa suite in Miami on Oct. 16, 2025. Luxury seaside haven in Sunny Isles Beach.
data.description: Introducing an exclusive one-bedroom suite that combines modern sophistication with Mediterranean charm in Miami. On October 16, 2025, Acqualina Resort & Residences on the Beach, a renowned luxury destination in Sunny Isles Beach with Forbes Five-Star and AAA Five Diamond ratings, unveiled its unique suite.

data.title: Invetech wins Gold in 2025 Australian Good Design Award for Digital Design. Recognition for excellence and innovation.
data.description: Invetech, a prominent company specializing in experience design-led instrument development, has recently received the esteemed 2025 Australian Good Design Award Gold for Digital Design Apps & Software. The award acknowledges Invetech's exceptional work in this field and highlights their innovative contributions. This recognition further solidifies Invetech's position as a global leader.

data.title: City Office REIT stockholders approve merger with MCME, all shares to be acquired by MCME.
data.description: In Vancouver on October 16, 2025, City Office REIT, Inc. (NYSE: CIO) disclosed that the Company's stockholders have voted in favor of a merger. This merger entails the acquisition of all existing shares of City Office by MCME.

data.title: Apple is in talks to buy Prompt AI to enhance on-device intelligence and tools according to ELD Asset Management.
data.description: A recent report by ELD Asset Management highlights Apple Inc.'s discussions to acquire Prompt AI with a goal to bolster on-device intelligence and improve developer tools. The deal is seen as strategic, focusing on enhancing technology capabilities. The analysis suggests that this acquisition could have a significant impact, with potential benefits for Apple in terms of innovation and product development.

data.title: Targa Resources Corp. declares $1.00 quarterly dividend per share, $4.00 annualized basis for Q3 2025. Dividend payout on Nov 17, 2025.
data.description: Houston-based Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) revealed its quarterly cash dividend of $1.00 per common share for Q3 of 2025, totaling $4.00 annually. The dividend will be distributed on November 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025.

data.title: CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) affirms proposed acquisition benefits Core Scientific (NASDAQ: CORZ) stockholders, correcting Two Seas Capital claims.
data.description: Livingston, New Jersey - CoreWeave Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV), known as The Essential Cloud for AI, issued an open letter to shareholders of Core Scientific, Inc. (NASDAQ: CORZ). The communication stresses CoreWeave's dedication to acquiring Core Scientific as per the agreed terms and addresses false information presented by Two Seas Capital, an event-driven hedge fund involved in legal matters. The letter aims to reassure Core Scientific stockholders of the commitment to the acquisition deal.

data.title: Newsmax unveils plan for Bitcoin, Trump meme coin treasury with emphasis on digital assets.
data.description: Newsmax, a media outlet traded publicly, is establishing a digital assets treasury that focuses on Bitcoin and the official meme coin linked to the president.

data.title: Rocket Doctor AI Inc. hires FN Media Group for 3-day news/media campaign starting Oct 20, 2025, for $14,085.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 16, 2025, Rocker Doctor AI Inc. (referred to as the “Company” or “Rocket Doctor AI”) (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) has revealed its partnership with FN Media Group, LLC (“FN Media”) for news and media marketing campaigns. These campaigns are set to run for three (3) days starting the week of October 20, 2025, with a cost of USD$14,085.

data.title: VirnetX (Nasdaq: VHC) secures GSA Schedule contract, becoming tech provider for government agencies.
data.description: In Zephyr Cove, Nevada, VirnetX Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: VHC), a prominent player in secure communications and zero-trust cybersecurity solutions, revealed that it secured a General Services Administration Multiple Award Schedule contract, referred to as the "GSA Schedule." This recognition authorizes VirnetX as a certified technology vendor for various government agencies at the federal, state, and local levels looking to enhance their cybersecurity, communications security, and digital engineering capabilities.

data.title: Trump uses recently enacted tax package to pay ICE agents during shutdown, bypassing Congress.
data.description: Using funds from a newly passed tax package, President Trump has taken action to provide payment to certain federal employees despite Congress not yet agreeing on a spending plan.
